title: Internals: Support a solver logfile
body:
I'm trying to debug something I broke in data sent to the solver.  We should have a debug mode which can make a logfile showing all communications to/from the solver e.g.
```
...
>(reset)
<(sat)
```

With that I could just diff old & new behavior and see my problem instantly (as I wasn't intending to change the data exchange.)

@YilouWang is there an existing alternative way to get this?

If not, how do you debug this sort of problem? Interest in adding it?

Thanks
